author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: broadcast_matmul implemented in ops/linalg.rs with full NumPy-style broadcast over leading dimensions. Handles all torch.matmul cases: 1D promotion (prepend/append + squeeze), 2D-6D+ with broadcast batch dims. 9 new tests covering shape correctness, value correctness, broadcast 1-vs-N, 4D, 1D+3D mixes, and error cases.
